items.final_wording: Supports duration, stool pattern, urgency, incontinence, weight loss, nocturnal symptoms, medicines, surgery, travel, family history, diet, and physical examination.

source.title: Guidelines for the investigation of chronic diarrhoea in adults: British Society of Gastroenterology, 3rd edition
source.jurisdiction: United Kingdom; international gastroenterology evidence requiring UAE adaptation
source.population: Adults with chronic diarrhoea; paediatric and acute infectious presentations require separate evidence.
source.exclusions: Supports duration, stool characteristics, alarm features, medicine, surgery, diet, travel, family, examination, and clinician-reviewed investigation context without diagnosing a cause or ordering tests.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports duration, stool pattern, urgency, incontinence, weight loss, nocturnal symptoms, medicines, surgery, travel, family history, diet, and physical examination.

items.rationale: The exact chronic-diarrhoea section supports interval duration, stool pattern, urgency, incontinence, weight loss, nocturnal symptoms, medicines, surgery, travel, family history, diet, and clinician-performed examination without assigning cause.

items.final_wording: Supports clinician review of existing blood, stool, FIT, endoscopy, imaging, coeliac, bile-acid, microscopic-colitis, and lactose-malabsorption investigations.

source.jurisdiction: United Kingdom; international gastroenterology evidence requiring UAE adaptation

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician review of existing blood, stool, FIT, endoscopy, imaging, coeliac, bile-acid, microscopic-colitis, and lactose-malabsorption investigations.

items.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording already reviewed blood, stool, FIT, coeliac, endoscopy, imaging, bile-acid, microscopic-colitis, and lactose-malabsorption context without ordering tests.

items.final_wording: Defines emergency and face-to-face referral features for adult gastroenteritis.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Gastroenteritis in Adults – 41
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth gastroenteritis documentation; partial for a broad diarrhea workflow without an adult or acute-duration filter.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines emergency and face-to-face referral features for adult gastroenteritis.

items.rationale: The exact DHA referral section supports clinician-entered safety-net, referral status, questions, and follow-up for qualified adult acute contexts without assigning urgency.
